items.title: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap, early projections say
items.summary: Not all votes have been counted, but the current trend suggests 55% of participants voted against the proposal.

items.title: Thousands Donate to Help Nebraska Ranchers Who Couldn’t Feed Their Animals After Wildfire Burned Every Acre of Grass
items.summary: A few months ago the largest wildfire in Nebraska history burned a thousand square-miles of ranch land. It burned every foot of grass on Mike and Kayla Wintz’s 11,000-acre ranch. But when they and the…
